label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's break down the scenario and the question. We have two people: Brown and Smith. Brown wants to kill Smith now. Smith is in another building. There is a bomb in that building. The bomb can be detonated by Brown, but only by producing a six-dotted image on the lens of a camera. This camera is focused on the top of a table in Brown's room and is wired to the bomb. So, in order to detonate the bomb and kill Smith, Brown must produce a six-dotted image on the camera lens. Brown takes out a normal, fair, six-sided die and tosses it onto the table, hoping
